title: Chennai Heat Wave
lead: Chennai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.09. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Chennai has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 9.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 85%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 4.2 km/h, which is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
